nasb.text: So they killed him and his sons and all his people, until there was no remnant left him; and they possessed his land.

esv.text: So they defeated him and his sons and all his people, until he had no survivor left. And they possessed his land.

cnv.text: 於是，他們殺了噩和他的兒子，以及他的眾民，沒有留下一個，就佔領了他的地。

ccb.text: 于是，以色列人杀了噩及其儿子和人民，一个不留，并夺取了他的国土。
